channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Settee and other items, 16th May
item.description:
Settee dumped outside 22 Evergreen Square. This is a hot spot fly tipping area. Every other day!!!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evergreen Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 16th May
item.description:
Dead fox lies outside of my property boundary (beyond a low wall at the back of my garden, at the back of Salvation Army building). You are welcome to access this space through my garden though.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 124, Welling High Street, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole on the corner, outside the school, 16th May
item.description:
This has been ongoing for several months and getting worse. The whole road needs redoing, but this pothole is dangerous.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Towncourt Lane, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, furniture, garden fence panels, buggy, vacuum, bed base and mattress, 16th May
item.description:
Every expanding pile of rubbish - started a couple of weeks ago with a few bits but is getting bigger and bigger On the pavement by mossington gardens

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mossington Gardens, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 forest bikes obstructing the pavement, 16th May
item.description:
I reported 3 bikes strewn across the pavement yesterday. They have been here for several days. People had to walk in the road. Also unsightly. Forest said the would remove in 2 hours but didn't. Someone has kindly stoid them up today but theycare still blocking the pavement. They are now not responding to my requests.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Beechwood Road, Hornsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Willow Road and Pilgrim's Lane, 16th May
item.description:
I have to use a mobility scooter when out and I found the unexpected unevenness in the gutter (see photo) at the corner of Pilgrim’s Lane and Willow Road nearly destabilised me – luckily my son was with me. Grateful if this could be repaired.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pilgrim's Lane, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Direction sign cover offf, 16th May
item.description:
Clayton Road Street sign 279?s has cover off and wires exposed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Clayton Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping again on Stroud Green Road, 16th May
item.description:
Yet more flytipping at the very southern end of Stroud Green Road on the Islington side. Still no enforcement from Islington, so more dumping in our community.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 259-261, Seven Sisters Road, Finsbury Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 16th May
item.description:
Yarn field Square. Please clear flytip on walkway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clayton Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypostering, 16th May
item.description:
Clayton Road. Remove flypostering from. Bus shekter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clayton Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Still debris all over the road, 16th May
item.description:
These are the pictures of the 1 tyre that couldn't be repaired due to the 25cm slice of glass embedded into the tyre. Clean the street it's simple

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Morpeth Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Keep Left bollard knocked over, 16th May
item.description:
Clayton Road junction of Peckham High street Keep Left bollard has been knocked over

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Clayton Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders van just dumped rubbish on the estate and drove away, 16th May
item.description:
Builders van came and dumped half of their truck load beside the recycling bins then drove off at speed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Carver Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Remove, 16th May
item.description:
Whe you do not remove fly tipping straigh away, people add more and more stuff, the bike lockers are completely blocked. This was reported last week and should have been resolved then.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged bollard, 16th May
item.description:
Queens Road by Meeting House Lane Outside Police Station bollard on centre island

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 182, Peckham High Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street Light - Equipment damaged, pole leaning

item.title: Pothole - road disintegrating, 16th May
item.description:
Pothole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Trees, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light dayburning, 16th May
item.description:
95B36 Can see this was reported in April!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackbrook Lane, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollards, 16th May
item.description:
Two large bollards that were previously on the property of number 19 Mera Drive have now been placed on the road by lamppost and are on the road side. The location is left at the slip road at the end of the drive
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mera Drive, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yellow line worn away, 16th May
item.description:
This is the 3rd timer I'm reporting this. Each time I'm fobbed of with it being passed to the relevant agent. People are parking over my access. Please sort this out. Don't close it until it's actually been fixed and not just sent to someone who is clearly not actioning it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Drive, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 16th May
item.description:
Carlton Grove junction of Queens Road Please remove graffiti from cycle hanger

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
